tasks.label: 1. Generate Salesforce Delta
tasks.command: mkdir -p delta && sf sgd source delta --from main --to HEAD --output-dir delta

tasks.label: 2. Show Current Target Org
tasks.command: echo "🔎 Current target org:" && sf config get target-org --json | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>console.log(JSON.parse(d).result[0].value))"

tasks.label: 4. Deploy Delta Manifest
tasks.command: TARGET_ORG=$(sf config get target-org --json | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>console.log(JSON.parse(d).result[0].value))") && echo "🚀 Deploying to: $TARGET_ORG" && echo "" && if [ "${input:confirmDeploy}" = "Yes" ]; then sf project deploy start --target-org "$TARGET_ORG" --manifest delta/package/package.xml; else echo "❌ Deployment cancelled"; fi
